mnemonics.title: Mnemonic 1
mnemonics.content: Tiny Twins Tango: For two small samples, remember to use the T-test, not the Z-test.

mnemonics.title: Key Point 1
mnemonics.content: Use the Student's t-distribution when sample sizes are small (typically n < 30) and population standard deviation is unknown.

mnemonics.title: Key Point 2
mnemonics.content: The test assumes that both samples come from normally distributed populations and that the populations have equal variances.

mnemonics.title: Key Point 3
mnemonics.content: The degrees of freedom for the test statistic is calculated as df = n1 + n2 - 2.
